title: LEGO Batman Legacy of the Dark Knight
shortDescription: Rise as the Dark Knight and experience the essential Batman story in a bold, action-packed adventure with hard-hitting combat, an open-world Gotham City, and the signature LEGO charm that fans know and love.
detailedDescriptionHtml:
LEGO® Batman™: Legacy of the Dark Knight is a narrative led action-adventure from TT Games, creators of LEGO® Star Wars™: The Skywalker Saga. Step into Bruce Wayne’s journey to become Batman, forging bonds with trusted allies while facing Gotham City’s most dangerous and iconic DC Super-Villains.

Embark on a journey that begins with the origins of Batman as a young Bruce Wayne trains with The League of Shadows, becomes the hero of Gotham City, and forge a new family of allies with Jim Gordon, Catwoman, Robin, Nightwing, and Batgirl. Confront an ever-growing threat from across Batman’s Rogue’s Gallery as you face The Joker, The Penguin, Mr. Freeze, Poison Ivy, Bane, and more.

Play as Batman with an exhilarating new combat system, combining fluid combos, stealth techniques, and detective skills to take on crime across the streets and rooftops of Gotham City. Command a full range of Batmobiles and Batcycles, including the legendary Tumbler, as you navigate an open and immersive Gotham City. Grapple, glide, or drive through the open world with agility and speed, while discovering crimes, challenges, rewards, secrets, and iconic landmarks such as Arkham Asylum, Ace Chemicals, and Wayne Tower.

Are you ready to build the legacy of the Dark Knight and protect Gotham City?
aboutTheGameHtml:

pcRequirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 11
  • Processor: Intel Core i5-10600K or AMD Ryzen 5 1600
  • Memory: 16 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 960, 4 GB or AMD Radeon RX 6400, 4 GB or Intel Arc A580, 8 GB
  • Storage: 50 GB available space
pcRequirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 11
  • Processor: Intel Core i7-12700 or AMD Ryzen 7 5800X
  • Memory: 16 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 2070 SUPER, 8 GB or AMD Radeon RX 6650 XT, 8 GB or Intel Arc B580, 12 GB
  • Storage: 50 GB available space

newsItems.title: There's a wildly obscure easter egg in Lego Batman, I'm surprised anyone found it: it's hidden in BASIC code for the Commodore 64
newsItems.author: James Bentley
newsItems.contents: Lego Batman, like all Lego games, is absolutely loaded with references and easter eggs. As well as recreating memorable scenes from the Dark Knight's storied history, it is packed with geeky, niche in-jokes. One such easter egg requires a Commodore 64 to actually make sense of... Read more.

newsItems.title: Рыцари Готэма в кубе: Обзор LEGO Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight
newsItems.author: Вадим Съедин
newsItems.contents: В начале года я поставил перед собой откровенно бредовую цель – пройти на 100% ремастер дилогии LEGO Harry Potter. Позднее я всё проклял из-за устаревшего геймдизайна, откровенно кривых решений разработчиков и паршивого качества самого переиздания, в котором никто не правил серьёзные баги. Впрочем, данный опыт заставил ещё больше ценить тот прогресс, которого достигла TT Games в LEGO Star Wars: The Skywalker Saga. Несмотря на производственный ад и ряд просчётов, в плане геймплея игра была на голову выше всех предыдущих работ команды.

newsItems.title: Аналитика: LEGO Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight разошлась тиражом более 1,2 миллиона копий
newsItems.author: Rakot
newsItems.contents: Согласно Alinea Analytics, продажи LEGO Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight превысили 1,2 миллиона копий. Стоит учесть, что компания занимается данными игрового рынка, используя собственные алгоритмы подсчёта. По словам Джеффа Грабба, её оценочные тиражи недавно выпущенных проектов довольно хороши, но не идеальны.
